/usr/bin/c++  -mavx -mfma -mavx2 -mbmi2 -O3 -g -Wall -Wextra -Werror -fno-rtti -Wno-unused-function -Wno-multichar -Wno-switch -Wno-attributes -Wno-missing-field-initializers -Wno-gnu-anonymous-struct -Wno-nested-anon-types -Wno-four-char-constants -Wno-unused-const-variable -Wno-deprecated-declarations -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/AnalyzeGames.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/DumpGames.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/EndgamePositionsGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/EndgameValidation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/FindMagics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/GameCollection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/GameTests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/NetworkTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/NetworkTrainer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/PackedPositionTests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/PgnParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/PgnParserTests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/PgnToTrainingData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/PlainTextToTrainingData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/PrepareTrainingData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/SelfPlay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/Stream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/Tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/ThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/TrainerCommon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/minitrace/minitrace.c.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/net/ActivationNode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/net/ConcatenationNode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/net/FullyConnectedNode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/net/Gradient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/net/Network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/net/Node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/net/SparseBinaryInputNode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/net/SparseInputNode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/net/SumNode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/net/TrainableNode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trainer.dir/net/WeightsStorage.cpp.o -o /home/sid/Documents/GitHub/G-ForceZero/trainer  ../../lib/libengine_lib.a -lgcc_s_asneeded -lgcc_s_asneeded
